mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-etcexpt-sql-oracle.xml - etcExptSql - 기타반출 - 기타반출 대상 조회 SQL */ SELECT 0 AS CHK /*체크박스*/ , MV.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MV.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , MV.SEQNO /*일련번호*/ , CT.CTNM /*센터명*/ , MV.IVMOVECLOSDATE /*재고이동완료일시*/ , MV.IVMOVERSNCD /*재고이동사유코드*/ , MV.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , ICB.BARCODE /*바코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , MV.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , MV.FRLCKEY /*FROM로케이션코드*/ , ZN.ZNNM AS TOZNKEY /*TO존코드*/ , MV.TOLCKEY /*TO로케이션코드*/ , MV.UOM /*단위*/ , CASE WHEN MV.QTY > 0 THEN ROUND(MV.QTY / COALESCE(ICUT.ICUNITQTY, 1),2) ELSE MV.QTY END AS QTYUNIT /*이동수량(단위)*/ , MV.QTY /*수량*/ , MV.EXPTQTY /*반출수량*/ , 0 AS INPUTQTY /*입력수량*/ , MV.EXPTRSNCD /*반출사유코드*/ , MV.EXPTRSNDTCONT /*반출사유상세내용*/ , MV.INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , MV.INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , MV.UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , MV.UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , MV.IVMOVEDTCONT /*재고이동상세내용*/ , CASE WHEN MV.QTY = MV.EXPTQTY THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS QTY_EDITABLE_YN /*입력수량 입력가능여부*/ FROM ( SELECT CTKEY, OWKEY, SEQNO, IVMOVECLOSDATE, IVMOVERSNCD, IVMOVEDTCONT, ICKEY, IVATKEY , FRLCKEY, TOZNKEY, TOLCKEY, UOM, QTY, EXPTQTY, EXPTRSNCD, EXPTRSNDTCONT , INSERTURKEY, INSERTDATE, UPDATEURKEY, UPDATEDATE FROM TWORK_INFO_IV_AD_MOVE /*재고관리자이동내역*/ WHERE TOZNKEY IN ('DFS', 'DMS', 'DNS', 'DFR', 'DMR', 'DNR', 'DMN', 'DMG') /*DFS: 센터내불량존, DMS: 센터내파손존, DNS: 센터내기부존, DFR:고객반품불량존, DMR: 고객반품파손존, DNR: 고객반품기부존, DMN: 고객반품미회수존*, DMG: 고객반품파손-식품존/ AND IVMOVEDIVCD IN ('10', '30') /*재고이동구분코드 10:관리자이동, 30:반품 재고이동*/ ) MV INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICB /*상품바코드 마스터*/ ON MV.CTKEY = ICB.CTKEY AND MV.OWKEY = ICB.OWKEY AND MV.ICKEY = ICB.ICKEY AND MV.UOM = ICB.UOM INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON MV.CTKEY = ZN.CTKEY AND MV.TOZNKEY = ZN.ZNKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC /*상품 마스터*/ ON ICB.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND ICB.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND ICB.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT /*센터 마스터*/ ON MV.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON MV.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND MV.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND MV.ICKEY = ICUT.ICKEY AND MV.UOM = ICUT.ICUNITTYPECD
#{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* wms-outbound-etcexpt-sql-oracle.xml - etcExptHsSql - 기타반출 - 기타반출 대상 이력조회 SQL */ SELECT IVHS.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , IVHS.OWKEY , CT.CTNM /*센터명*/ , IVHS.INSERTDATE AS IVCHGDATE /*반출일시*/ , IVHS.ICKEY /*상품 코드*/ , ICB.BARCODE /*바코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IVHS.IVATKEY /*재고 속성 코드*/ , IVHS.FRLCKEY /*FROM 로케이션 코드*/ , IVHS.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , IVHS.QTY /*반출수량*/ , (IVHS.QTY * IC.SLPRC) AS SLPRC /*금액*/ , IVHS.EXPTRSNCD /*반출사유*/ , IVHS.EXPTRSNDTCONT /*상세사유*/ , IVHS.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , IVHS.INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , IVHS.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , IVHS.UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_IVHS IVHS /*상품재고이력정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICB /*상품바코드 마스터*/ ON IVHS.CTKEY = ICB.CTKEY AND IVHS.OWKEY = ICB.OWKEY AND IVHS.ICKEY = ICB.ICKEY AND IVHS.UOM = ICB.UOM INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC /*상품 마스터*/ ON ICB.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND ICB.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND ICB.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT /*센터 마스터*/ ON IVHS.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY WHERE IVHS.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVHS.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVHS.IVHSTYPECD = #{ivhstypecd} AND IVHS.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey} AND IVHS.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND IVHS.FRLCKEY = #{lckey} ORDER BY IVHS.IVHSKEY DESC
